subject: Exciting News — Interview Invitation for Machine Learning Engineer (Mid-Level) at TechStartup Egypt
body:
Dear Mostafa,

I'm thrilled to inform you that we're moving forward with your application for the Machine Learning Engineer (Mid-Level) role at TechStartup Egypt! Your proficiency in Python and experience with TensorFlow are truly impressive, and we believe these skills will be a great asset to our team.

As discussed, I'd like to schedule an interview to further explore your technical skills and discuss potential gaps. We'll also take the opportunity to share more about our company culture and research opportunities. Please let me know your availability within the next two weeks (Monday–Thursday, 10 AM – 4 PM). You can expect a mix of technical questions and discussions about how you'd fit in with our team.

Looking forward to speaking with you soon!
Best regards,
[Your Name]
